properties.Test Case: Publish to Bloom Reader: via USB and via WiFi.
properties.Steps: Publish to Bloom Reader: via USB and via WiFi.

properties.Test Case: Save a .bloomPUB file to disk and then transfer it to a device and make sure it's intact. Also, open the file in BloomPUB Viewer (Windows).
properties.Steps: Save a .bloomPUB file to disk and then transfer it to a device and make sure it's intact. Also, open the file in BloomPUB Viewer (Windows).

properties.Test Case: Ensure that only fonts for the local and national language are embedded when the regional (L3) language is never used in the book, and that fonts assigned to styles are not embedded if the styles aren't used in the final book. (and conversely that all fonts needed are embedded for all three languages and for customized styles.) Note that Andika and ABeeZee are never embedded as they come standard with Bloom Reader.
properties.Steps: Ensure that only fonts for the local and national language are embedded when the regional (L3) language is never used in the book, and that fonts assigned to styles are not embedded if the styles aren't used in the final book. (and conversely that all fonts needed are embedded for all three languages and for customized styles.)  Note that Andika and ABeeZee are never embedded as they come standard with Bloom Reader.

properties.Test Case: Install a new font on your computer from https://software.sil.org/fonts/. Create a book using this font and try to publish to Bloom Reader. The font should get embedded.
properties.Steps: Install a new font on your computer from https://software.sil.org/fonts/. Create a book using this font and try to publish to Bloom Reader. The font should get embedded.

properties.Test Case: Test Bulk Publishing. In the Google Drive \Bloom Team\Testing\Materials for Bloom Editor Testing, Koen's collection "MC - YRT - Yumi Read Level 3 - ETP.zip" is a good place to start. Ensure resulting .bloombundle can be opened in Bloom Reader.
properties.Steps: Test Bulk Publishing. In the Google Drive \Bloom Team\Testing\Materials for Bloom Editor Testing, Koen's collection "MC - YRT - Yumi Read Level 3 - ETP.zip" is a good place to start. Ensure resulting .bloombundle can be opened in Bloom Reader.
